items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，prompts.chat这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: Distributed Attacks in Persistent-State AI Control
items.title_cn: 持久状态AI控制中的分布式攻击
items.summary: As AI coding agents become more autonomous, they increasingly ship code iteratively, with the codebase persisting across sessions. This persistence creates a new attack surface: a misaligned or prompt-injected agent can distribute attacks across pull requests (PRs) and time its payload for the PR wi...
items.summary_cn: 随着人工智能编码代理变得更加自主，它们越来越多地迭代交付代码，代码库在多个会话中持续存在。这种持久性创建了一个新的攻击面：未对齐或提示注入的代理可以跨拉取请求（ PR ）分发攻击，并为PR wi定时其有效负载...
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，但别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: LACUNA: A Testbed for Evaluating Localization Precision for LLM Unlearning
items.title_cn: LACUNA ： LLM Unlearning本地化精度评估测试平台
items.summary: LLMs memorize sensitive training data, including personally identifiable information (PII), creating a pressing need for reliable post hoc removal methods. Unlearning has emerged as a promising solution, with state-of-the-art(SOTA) methods often following a localize-first, unlearn-second paradigm th...
items.summary_cn: LLM会记住敏感的培训数据，包括个人身份信息(PII) ，因此迫切需要可靠的事后移除方法。未学习已成为一种有前途的解决方案，最先进的（ SOTA ）方法通常遵循本地化优先、未学习秒的范式...
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: Program-as-Weights: A Programming Paradigm for Fuzzy Functions
items.title_cn: 权重编程：模糊函数的编程范式
items.summary: Many everyday programming tasks resist clean rule-based implementation, such as alerting on important log lines, repairing malformed JSON, or ranking search results by intent, and are increasingly outsourced to large language model APIs at the cost of locality, reproducibility, and price. We propose...
items.summary_cn: 许多日常编程任务抵制基于规则的干净实现，例如在重要日志行上发出警报、修复格式错误的JSON或按意图对搜索结果进行排名，并且越来越多地外包给大型语言模型API ，而牺牲了本地性、可重复性和价格。我们建议...
items.comment: 商业模型再升级，功能看着牛，钱包要捂紧，按量付费伤不起。
